Coach Carter (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $67,264,877Details
International Box Office $9,400,630
Worldwide Box Office $76,665,507
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,182,960 (36.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.78 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:87.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,524 opening theaters/2,574 max. theaters, 6.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $125,505,142

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 14th, 2005 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: May 27th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: June 21st, 2005 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, sexual content, language, teen partying and some drug material.
Running Time: 137 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue
Plot point: Basketball, Biography, Inspirational Coach
Social setting: Hood Film
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Sports Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: MTV Films, Tollin/Robbins
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
